mapper.sql: /* UnpayBondMgmtMapper.unpayBondList */ SELECT A.STDR_YM , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.STDR_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 'YYYY-MM') AS STDR_YM_EX , A.BILL_YM , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.BILL_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 'YYYY-MM') AS BILL_YM_EX , A.BILL_ITEM_CD , FN_GET_SALE_ITMNM(A.BILL_ITEM_CD) AS SALE_ITM_NM , SUM(NVL(A.INV_AMNT, 0)) AS INV_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.INV_VAT , 0)) AS INV_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.INV_AMNT, 0) + NVL(A.INV_VAT, 0)) AS TOT_INV_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_AMNT, 0)) AS ADJ_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_VAT , 0)) AS ADJ_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_AMNT, 0) + NVL(A.ADJ_VAT, 0)) AS TOT_ADJ_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.INV_AMNT, 0) + NVL(A.INV_VAT, 0) - (NVL(A.ADJ_AMNT, 0) + NVL(A.ADJ_VAT, 0))) AS REAL_INV_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.PYM_AMNT, 0)) AS PYM_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.PYM_VAT , 0)) AS PYM_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.PYM_AMNT, 0) + NVL(A.PYM_VAT, 0)) AS TOT_PYM_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.UNPD_AMNT, 0) + NVL(A.UNPD_VAT, 0)) AS UNPD_AMNT , SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(A.INV_AMNT, 0) + NVL(A.INV_VAT, 0) - NVL(A.ADJ_AMNT, 0) - NVL(A.ADJ_VAT, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS INV_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(A.PYM_AMNT, 0) + NVL(A.PYM_VAT, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS PYM_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(A.INV_AMNT, 0) + NVL(A.INV_VAT, 0) - NVL(A.ADJ_AMNT, 0) - NVL(A.ADJ_VAT, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) - SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(A.PYM_AMNT, 0) + NVL(A.PYM_VAT, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS UNPD_CNT FROM MSP_UNPD_BOND_MST A WHERE STDR_YM = #{stdrYm} AND BILL_YM BETWEEN #{strtYm} AND #{endYm} GROUP BY A.STDR_YM, A.BILL_YM, A.BILL_ITEM_CD ORDER BY A.BILL_YM DESC, A.BILL_ITEM_CD
mapper.select: /* UnpayBondMgmtMapper.getAdjAmntDtl */ SELECT SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_A_AMNT, 0)) AS ADJ_A_AMNT /* 할인 */ , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_A_VAT, 0)) AS ADJ_A_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_B_AMNT, 0)) AS ADJ_B_AMNT /* 클레임 */ , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_B_VAT , 0)) AS ADJ_B_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_C_AMNT, 0)) AS ADJ_C_AMNT /* 위약금(공시지원금1) */ , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_C_VAT , 0)) AS ADJ_C_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_D_AMNT, 0)) AS ADJ_D_AMNT /* 위약금(공시지원금2) */ , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_D_VAT , 0)) AS ADJ_D_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_E_AMNT, 0)) AS ADJ_E_AMNT /* 위약금(추가지원금1) */ , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_E_VAT , 0)) AS ADJ_E_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_F_AMNT, 0)) AS ADJ_F_AMNT /* 위약금(추가지원금2) */ , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_F_VAT , 0)) AS ADJ_F_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_G_AMNT, 0)) AS ADJ_G_AMNT /* 절사 */ , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_G_VAT , 0)) AS ADJ_G_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_H_AMNT, 0)) AS ADJ_H_AMNT /* 기타 */ , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_H_VAT , 0)) AS ADJ_H_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_AMNT, 0) + NVL(A.ADJ_VAT, 0)) AS TOTAL FROM MSP_UNPD_BOND_MST A WHERE STDR_YM = #{stdrYm} AND BILL_YM = #{billYm} AND BILL_ITEM_CD = #{billItemCd}

/* UnpayBondMgmtMapper.unpayBondDtlList */ SELECT A.STDR_YM , A.USG_YM , A.BILL_YM , A.BILL_ITEM_CD , FN_GET_SALE_ITMNM(A.BILL_ITEM_CD) AS SALE_ITM_NM , SUM(NVL(A.INV_AMNT,0)) AS INV_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.INV_VAT ,0)) AS INV_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_AMNT,0)) AS ADJ_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_VAT ,0)) AS ADJ_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_AMNT,0) + NVL(ADJ_VAT,0)) AS TOT_ADJ_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_A_AMNT,0)) AS ADJ_A_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_A_VAT ,0)) AS ADJ_A_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_B_AMNT,0)) AS ADJ_B_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_B_VAT ,0)) AS ADJ_B_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_C_AMNT,0)) AS ADJ_C_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_C_VAT ,0)) AS ADJ_C_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_D_AMNT,0)) AS ADJ_D_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_D_VAT ,0)) AS ADJ_D_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_E_AMNT,0)) AS ADJ_E_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_E_VAT ,0)) AS ADJ_E_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_F_AMNT,0)) AS ADJ_F_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_F_VAT ,0)) AS ADJ_F_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_G_AMNT,0)) AS ADJ_G_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_G_VAT ,0)) AS ADJ_G_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_H_AMNT,0)) AS ADJ_H_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_H_VAT ,0)) AS ADJ_H_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.INV_AMNT,0) + NVL(A.INV_VAT,0) - (NVL(A.ADJ_AMNT,0) + NVL(A.ADJ_VAT,0))) AS TOT_INV_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.PYM_AMNT,0)) AS PYM_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.PYM_VAT ,0)) AS PYM_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.PYM_AMNT,0) + NVL(A.PYM_VAT,0)) AS TOT_PYM_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.UNPD_AMNT,0)) AS UNPD_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.UNPD_VAT ,0)) AS UNPD_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.UNPD_AMNT,0) + NVL(A.UNPD_VAT,0)) AS TOT_UNPD_AMNT /* 검색조건 있는 경우 */
, A.SVC_CNTR_NO , MAX(A.CONTRACT_NUM) AS CONTRACT_NUM , MIN(A.DUEDAT_DATE) AS DUEDAT_DATE , MAX(A.BLPYM_DATE) AS BLPYM_DATE , FN_GET_CODENM ('CLS0045', MAX(A.PYMN_MTHD_CD)) AS PYMN_MTHD_NM , FN_GET_CODENM ('MSP0003', MIN(B.SUB_STATUS)) AS STATUS_NM , FN_GET_ORGNM(DECODE(B.OPEN_AGNT_CD, NULL, '1100011741', 'K000001', '1100011741', 'AA00364', '1100011741', '1100005928', '1100011741', B.OPEN_AGNT_CD)) AS OPEN_AGNT_NM , MIN(B.SUB_LINK_NAME) AS SUB_LINK_NAME , CASE WHEN MIN(A.DUEDAT_DATE) < MAX(A.BLPYM_DATE) THEN TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(NVL(MAX(A.BLPYM_DATE), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')), 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(MIN(A.DUEDAT_DATE), 'YYYYMMDD'))) ELSE 0 END AS UNPD_MNTH_CNT
FROM MSP_UNPD_BOND_MST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.STDR_YM = #{stdrYm} AND A.BILL_YM BETWEEN #{strtYm} AND #{endYm} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM(+) /* 검색조건 있는 경우 */
AND ( A.UNPD_AMNT + A.UNPD_VAT ) > 0
AND (A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{searchVal} OR A.CONTRACT_NUM = (SELECT DISTINCT CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST WHERE SVC_CNTR_NO = #{searchVal}))
AND B.SUB_LINK_NAME LIKE #{searchVal} || '%'
AND B.SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{searchVal}
GROUP BY A.STDR_YM, A.USG_YM, A.BILL_YM, A.BILL_ITEM_CD /* 검색조건 있는 경우 */
, A.SVC_CNTR_NO, B.OPEN_AGNT_CD
ORDER BY A.BILL_YM, A.BILL_ITEM_CD

/* UnpayBondMgmtMapper.getAdjRsnList */ SELECT A.BILL_YM , A.SVC_CNTR_NO , A.BILL_ITEM_CD , FN_GET_SALE_ITMNM (A.BILL_ITEM_CD) AS BILL_ITEM_NM , A.ADJS_RSN_CD , FN_GET_CODENM ('CLS0044', A.ADJS_RSN_CD) AS ADJS_RSN_NM , SUM (DECODE (A.PYMN_CD, 'ADJ', A.PYMN_AMNT, 'ADJR', A.PYMN_AMNT * -1)) AS ADJ_AMNT , SUM (DECODE (A.PYMN_CD, 'ADJ', A.VAT_AMNT, 'ADJR', A.VAT_AMNT * -1)) AS ADJ_VAT , SUM (DECODE (A.PYMN_CD, 'ADJ', A.PYMN_AMNT, 'ADJR', A.PYMN_AMNT * -1)) + SUM (DECODE (A.PYMN_CD, 'ADJ', A.VAT_AMNT, 'ADJR', A.VAT_AMNT * -1)) AS TOT_ADJ_AMNT FROM CLS_BILL_PYMN_DATA A WHERE A.BILL_YM = #{billYm} AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{svcCntrNo} AND A.PYMN_CD IN ('ADJ', 'ADJR') GROUP BY A.BILL_YM, A.SVC_CNTR_NO, A.BILL_ITEM_CD, A.ADJS_RSN_CD
